---
title: "National GIS Data"
subtitle: "A collection of spatial datasets designed to support public health spatial analyses and visualizations."
date-modified: last-modified
title-block-banner: true
listing:
  categories: true
  contents: "resources/us"
  fields: [title, categories, data_description, data_time_frame, data_spatial_scale, data_format, data_source, data_orig_repo, data_living_atlas]
  filter-ui: true
  id: sample-listings
  sort: "title asc"
  template: assets/data_catalog/data_listing.ejs.md
format:
  html:
    css: assets/data_catalog/data_listing.css
---

::: {#sample-listings}
:::
